sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Ribbon Chute (Parachute)
special_mechanics.description: Kurt has a parachute contained within his outfit that can be used indefinitely. Deploys immediately and retracts automatically when not being used. Allows Kurt to make long jumps, survive long falls, and utilize updrafts.

special_mechanics.name: Atmospheric Entry Descent
special_mechanics.description: Level start sequence where Kurt jumps from the Jim Dandy space station in orbit. During descent, must dodge anti-air missiles triggered by Minecrawler radar contact.

special_mechanics.name: Energy Stream Endgame
special_mechanics.description: After level completion, Minecrawler disintegrates and Kurt is sucked into energy stream. Must pursue health power-up within set time period. Touching stream walls causes health loss and deceleration.

special_mechanics.name: Snowboarding Sequences
special_mechanics.description: Some levels feature snowboarding sequences where Kurt must navigate obstacles while destroying enemies.

special_mechanics.name: Glider Mechanic
special_mechanics.description: Some levels feature a glider which Kurt must ride to a specific location.

special_mechanics.name: Bombing Ship Control
special_mechanics.description: Some levels feature Kurt taking over an enemy bombing ship and performing bombing runs.

tier_notes: Tier 2 classification: Empirical/qualitative data only. Wikipedia source provides gameplay mechanics documentation but lacks precise physics parameters (velocities, accelerations, gravity values). Movement is documented qualitatively through special mechanics (ribbon chute, descent, energy stream) rather than numerical values. No sub-pixel system information available.
